name: liteparse
description: Local LiteParse skill for document parsing, OCR, and PDF screenshots.

interface.shortDescription: Parse documents locally with OCR support
interface.longDescription: Use LiteParse inside Codex to parse PDFs, Office files, and images locally. Extract text or JSON, run OCR on scans, and generate PDF page screenshots without cloud dependencies.
defaultPrompt: Parse this PDF into JSON with OCR if needed.
Batch parse this contracts folder into text output.
Generate screenshots for pages 1-3 of this PDF.
